projects.title: FlappyMC Pygame
projects.bodyText: Developed by Edwin Deras Jr., FlappyMC is a simple Flappy Bird clone built using Pygame in Python utilizing Minecraft game assets.

projects.title: SEC-INFRA-01: Security Infrastructure (NIST Alignment Profile)
projects.bodyText: Co-authored by Edwin Deras Jr. and Marwin Deras, this project focuses on designing and implementing a robust security infrastructure aligned with the NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF) for Eagle Eye Security using a baseline framework of NIST SP 800-30 auditing.

projects.title: SEC-BCP-01: Business Continuity (NIST Alignment Profile)
projects.bodyText: Co-authored by Edwin Deras Jr. and Marwin Deras, this project implements a detailed business continuity plan aligned with the NIST CSF framework for Eagle Eye Security, utilizing a comprehensive risk assessment structured around the NIST SP 800-30 auditing standard.
